# services.heisenbridge

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.heisenbridge`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.heisenbridge.address` | `string` | Address to listen on. IPv6 does not seem to be supported. |
| `services.heisenbridge.debug` | `boolean` | More verbose logging. Recommended during initial setup. |
| `services.heisenbridge.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Matrix to IRC bridge. |
| `services.heisenbridge.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Heisenbridge is configured over the command line. Append extra arguments here |
| `services.heisenbridge.homeserver` | `string` | The URL to the home server for client-server API calls |
| `services.heisenbridge.identd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable identd service support. |
| `services.heisenbridge.identd.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | identd listen port |
| `services.heisenbridge.namespaces` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Configure the 'namespaces' section of the registration.yml for the bridge and the server |
| `services.heisenbridge.owner` | `null or string` | Set owner MXID otherwise first talking local user will claim the bridge |
| `services.heisenbridge.package` | `package` | The heisenbridge package to use. |
| `services.heisenbridge.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen on |
| `services.heisenbridge.registrationUrl` | `string` | The URL where the application service is listening for HS requests, from the Matrix HS perspective.# The default value assumes the bridge runs on the same host as the home server, in the same network. |
